03-10-2026-0753.png:
A 8.5x11 inch poster of a red flag on top of a mountain underneath a blue sky, Text as follows: MHS Computer Science Club's 8th
(in red) hackMHS
HACKATHON (in small text) April 25 to 26, 2026.
QR code. Beside is a red flag with the number 8 written on top. Text behind says "CLIMBING THE PEAK". A main text box below says: "HackMHS is a FREE overnight hackathon competition for both beginners and experts! Comete, create, and collaborate with teams of up to 4 to make games, websites, or robots and win awesome prizes!
Meet new friends, eat free snacks and food like Chick-Fil-A, and take part in fun activities such as ping-pong, kareoke, and a coding competition!

02-22-2026-2243.png: It never happened: Final web design

A cleaner version of "It never happened: Web design". The most notable changes are: no text, the perspective in the header being less dramatic, gray boxes replace the locations of Heidi, Orpheus, and Wallace the fox, and the image cuts off before the footer.
02-22-2026-0113.png: A typography logo of Afterworld. An arrow transitioning from purple to yellow crossed the world 'after'. Below, the world 'WORLD' is written in capital letters, with the O being a blue planet.
02-12-2026-1409.png: A drawing of an orange and black fox. A caption beside reads "Wallace the fox".
02-12-2026-1351.png: A website draft design. On the header, a fox with a halo and wings falls from a bright blue sky, toward a yellow grassy field where Orpheus and Heidi, wearing halos and wings, observe. "Hack Club" is written above in small design below "AFTERWORLD". The design shifts to a view of a purple canyon. A paragraph below reads, "You, an angel hunter, have lost your body while travelling to the afterworld. Two angels offer you help- for a price." Below, heidi and orpheus cross a bridge. The footer is a splashing ocean.

02-02-2026-0003.png:
Magazine page talking about twoswap. Text from top to bottom:
TWOSWAP, made by Nick (17, USA) for Hackaday Supercon 9.
TWOSWAP is a TV-head and your new best friend.
He's also my first interactive hardware project. I had lots of roadblocks, but being able to interact with others while publicly presenting as him was worth it!
(photo of twoswap's face display) runs pygame for custom facial expressions
(photo of a raspberry pi zero 2w) powered by a (pi 5) (crossed out) (died) RPI0 2w.
(photo of a bandana and a cardboard perfboard circuit) entirely handsewn bandana and arm/kneepads, which contain an LED perfboard powered by 2x CR2032s
a photo of the inside of twoswap's head, containing (clockwise starting from top): bike helmet, power bank, hdmi to lvds board, rc detect, laptop screen.
(a photo of twoswap standing next to Nirav, founder of Framework) mandatory aura farming. thank you nirav! (qr code to twoswap's github repo beside)

He has a scarred eye, green bandana, bright yellow, green, and blue wings, gloves, and armband, and insulin pump/monitor. Text beside reads "Notable accessories include: - Gloves, armband, - Insulin pump/monitor, - Bandana". His back design shows a transparent cylindrical box containing a orange and yellow crystal, with a tube attached to his insulin pump.
